# Red Queen

> Deterministic orchestrator for AI coding agents. Zero-token state machine
> dispatches Claude Code workers through a full SDLC pipeline (spec → code →
> review → test → human review) with configurable human gates.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/README.md): product overview, quickstart, FAQ
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/AGENTS.md): architecture, interfaces, style for AI agents working in the repo
- [Contributing](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): dev loop, release process, how to add an adapter

## Adapters

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/src/integrations/github-issues/README.md)
- [Jira](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/src/integrations/jira/README.md)
- [GitHub source control](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/src/integrations/github/README.md)

## Examples

- [GitHub Issues + PAT](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/tree/master/examples/github-issues)
- [Jira + GitHub App](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/tree/master/examples/jira-github)

## Optional

- [Skills contract](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/src/skills/README.md): how to write / override skills
- [Changelog](https://github.com/odyth/red-queen/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
